name: JAGGAER Procurement API
what_it_does: JAGGAER REST API for enterprise procurement and supplier management platform. Enables AI agents to manage sourcing events, supplier qualification, purchase orders, contracts, and spend analytics for both direct and indirect procurement. JAGGAER serves manufacturing, higher education, life sciences, and public sector with deep category-specific procurement capabilities.
use_cases: Managing sourcing events and supplier bids from procurement automation agents
Processing supplier qualification and onboarding from vendor management agents
Tracking purchase orders and contract compliance from P2P agents
Analyzing direct and indirect spend from category management agents
not_for: SMB procurement without complex sourcing requirements
Simple AP automation without supplier lifecycle management
Consumer purchasing without enterprise procurement workflows
best_when: An enterprise manufacturing, education, or public sector organization using JAGGAER wants AI agents to automate supplier management, sourcing events, and procurement workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Procurement and supplier contract operations have financial and legal consequences. JAGGAER serves regulated sectors (public sector, life sciences) with heightened compliance requirements.

auth.notes: JAGGAER uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. Enterprise customer credentials required. API access enabled through JAGGAER implementation team.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual contracts
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise licensing per module and user; pricing negotiated
pricing.notes: Enterprise procurement company with global deployments across multiple verticals. Previously known as SciQuest (Higher Ed focus).

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits; varies by customer tier

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Sourcing events and supplier contracts have real financial and legal consequences
No public MCP server — enterprise-only REST API
Limited public documentation — enterprise customer access and implementation team required
FedRAMP authorized for US public sector — strict change control requirements
Complex domain model covering direct spend (BOM, manufacturing) and indirect spend
Previously SciQuest — may encounter legacy API patterns in older integrations
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Procurement financial data. SOC2, GDPR, FedRAMP. Enterprise-only with limited public docs. Public sector deployments under heightened compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Procurement and supplier data. SOC2, GDPR, FedRAMP. Enterprise-only. Public sector deployments with elevated compliance.
